description: A VFX compositor needs to create a 'dream sequence' look for a character animation. Open the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and apply a Blur effect with a radius of at least 5 to the animation column. Render at least 20 frames of the result as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blur_fx/'.
